items.name_en: 💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Mini Wallet
items.name_cn:
💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Mini Wallet
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This beige and dark brown mini wallet reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected new GG monogram canvas. Carefully designed with multiple card slots, cleverly incorporating practical snap closure.
Model: 821802.
Dimensions: 19(L) x 11(W)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Oversized Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Oversized Mini Shoulder Bag
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This beige and dark brown oversized mini shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected new GG monogram canvas. Carefully designed with multiple compartments, cleverly incorporating D-rings for hanging items.
◇Beige and dark brown new GG monogram coated canvas
. Brown leather trim
◇Taffeta lining
◇ Gucci embossed
◇Also comes with D-rings for hanging removable items
. Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
. Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm high)
. Snap closure
Model: 820688.
Dimensions: 20(L) x 12.5(W) x 5(D)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Series Card Holder with Strap
items.name_cn:
💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Series Card Holder with Strap
The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, creating a collectible choice for years to come. This beige and dark brown card holder reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from new GG monogram canvas. Multi-compartment design for practicality, paired with a brown leather strap for added texture.
Model: 819113.
Dimensions: 12(L) x 7.5(W)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💕【New Arrival】Iconic GG Supreme Canvas in the 2025 Early Autumn Collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with a blue tone. This beige and dark brown card case features a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
items.name_cn:
💕【New Arrival】Iconic GG Supreme Canvas in the 2025 Early Autumn Collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with a blue tone. This beige and dark brown card case features a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
Beige and dark brown GG Supreme canvas
All-over blue floral print
Cloud print fabric lining
Inside: 1 open slot; 4 card slots
Model: 841149.
Size: 11cm(W) x 7cm(H)
Color: Beige embossed print / Original leather.
Weight: approx. 0.03kg
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💕【New】Circular Interlocking G motif inspired by the brand's heritage, adding a touch of elegance to green matte calfskin accessories. This 1970s style motif shines on this green matte calfskin cardholder. The interior features multiple compartments for various uses.
items.name_cn:
💕【New】Circular Interlocking G motif inspired by the brand's heritage, adding a touch of elegance to green matte calfskin accessories. This 1970s style motif shines on this green matte calfskin cardholder. The interior features multiple compartments for various uses.
Green matte calfskin
Taffeta lining
Enamel circular interlocking G details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818795
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Green matte leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
